subtitles.original: 書いてあると思うんですけどね、サムネに
subtitles.english: I think it's already written on the thumbnail, though.

subtitles.original: 二人から重大告知がございます！
subtitles.english: We have a major announcement to make!

subtitles.original: なんと！二人のオリジナルコラボ楽曲が出ます！
subtitles.english: Our original collaboration song is actually coming out!

subtitles.original: やったー！嬉しい！いいんですか？
subtitles.english: Yay! I'm so happy! Is it really okay?

subtitles.original: ということでタイトルは、せーの、最強未来衝動！
subtitles.english: So, the title is, on three... Saikyou Mirai Shoudou!

subtitles.original: という、なんだか強そうなタイトルですね。強い曲ですね。強い曲です。
subtitles.english: That's quite a powerful-sounding title. It's a powerful song. Yes, it is.

subtitles.original: ということで、なんと、今日初披露させていただきます！
subtitles.english: And today, we're performing it for the absolute first time!

subtitles.original: 頑張ろう！それでは早速聴いてもらえますか？
subtitles.english: Let's do our best! Shall we have you listen to it right away?

subtitles.original: はい！はい！
subtitles.english: Yes! Yes!

subtitles.original: よいしょ。よいしょ。それでは聴いてください。
subtitles.english: Here we go! Well then, please listen to it!

subtitles.original: だから just fly to the star
subtitles.english: So just fly to the star

subtitles.original: もっと wow wow
subtitles.english: More, wow wow

subtitles.original: 世界中で proudy glow
subtitles.english: Proudly glow all over the world

subtitles.original: 存在など歌い切って無い無い
subtitles.english: There's no trace of our existence left, none at all

subtitles.original: 壊れても関係ない
subtitles.english: Even if we break, it doesn't matter

subtitles.original: そっと触れるよ 生まれたての星へ
subtitles.english: I'll gently touch the newborn star

subtitles.original: 囁きながら 願い重ねた宇宙(そら)
subtitles.english: Whispering as our wishes overlap in the sky

subtitles.original: ほどけた軌道は 誰も知らない場所へ
subtitles.english: The unraveled orbit heads to a place nobody knows

subtitles.original: 微かな記憶と夢を この声に込めて
subtitles.english: Pouring faint memories and dreams into this voice

subtitles.original: 今を 過去を
subtitles.english: The present, the past...

subtitles.original: 未来を辿る
subtitles.english: ...tracing the future

subtitles.original: 一瞬を 一生を
subtitles.english: An instant, a lifetime

subtitles.original: この手で掴む
subtitles.english: I'll grasp it with these hands

subtitles.original: 超BIG!BANG!
subtitles.english: A super BIG BANG!

subtitles.original: ただこのまま果てまで
subtitles.english: Just like this, to the very end

subtitles.original: 溶けちゃって
subtitles.english: Melting away

subtitles.original: 切り裂かれたいような衝動
subtitles.english: An impulse like wanting to be torn apart

subtitles.original: 抱かれて 染まって 振り切って
subtitles.english: Embraced, dyed, and shaken off completely

subtitles.original: まだ
subtitles.english: Still...

subtitles.original: まだ ほら また星を 締め付ける
subtitles.english: ...still, look, once again squeezing the stars

subtitles.original: 君と絡まってみようか
subtitles.english: Shall we try getting tangled together?

subtitles.original: 止まらないよ 最強未来衝動
subtitles.english: It won't stop, the ultimate future impulse

subtitles.original: ただ
subtitles.english: Just...

subtitles.original: ただ ただ ただ ただ 剥がれ落ちてく
subtitles.english: ...just, just, just peeling and falling away

subtitles.original: 広がって 咲いて 駆け出して 飛んで
subtitles.english: Spreading, blooming, running, and flying

subtitles.original: 君と just fly to the star
subtitles.english: With you, just fly to the star

subtitles.original: もっと wow wow
subtitles.english: More, wow wow

subtitles.original: 無重力で dreamy show
subtitles.english: A dreamy show in zero gravity

subtitles.original: 運命など待ちきれ無い無い
subtitles.english: We can't wait for destiny, not at all

subtitles.original: 壊れても関係ない
subtitles.english: Even if we break, it doesn't matter

subtitles.original: そっと祈るよ 幾千年の星へ
subtitles.english: I'll gently pray to the star of thousands of years

subtitles.original: 彷徨いながら 僕ら出会えたんだ
subtitles.english: Wandering around, we managed to find each other

subtitles.original: 燃え尽きる前に 誰も彼も急ぐよ
subtitles.english: Before burning out, everyone is rushing

subtitles.original: 確かな希望と信念を この声に込めて
subtitles.english: Pouring certain hope and conviction into this voice

subtitles.original: 星よ 光れ
subtitles.english: Shine, stars!

subtitles.original: 闇を照らせ
subtitles.english: Illuminate the darkness!

subtitles.original: 歌よ 響け
subtitles.english: Resound, song!

subtitles.original: 遥か彼方へ
subtitles.english: To the far reaches...

subtitles.original: 超BIG!BANG!
subtitles.english: ...of a super BIG BANG!

subtitles.original: 引力にさあ 導かれ
subtitles.english: Now, guided by gravity

subtitles.original: この手を繋いだら それだけでいい
subtitles.english: If we hold hands, that's all we need

subtitles.original: 聞いて！ 鳴り止まない絶唱
subtitles.english: Listen! This ceaseless masterpiece

subtitles.original: 愛して 焦がして 振り切って
subtitles.english: Loving, burning, shaking off completely

subtitles.original: まだ
subtitles.english: Still...

subtitles.original: まだ ほら また宇宙(そら)を 駆け巡る
subtitles.english: ...still, look, soaring through the sky once again

subtitles.original: 君を狂わせてみようか
subtitles.english: Shall we try driven crazy by this?

subtitles.original: 止まらないで 絶対未来衝動
subtitles.english: Don't stop, the absolute future impulse

subtitles.original: ただ
subtitles.english: Just...

subtitles.original: ただ ただ ただ ただ 生まれ落ちてく
subtitles.english: ...just, just, just being born into the world

subtitles.original: そばにいて 触れて 輝いて 消えて
subtitles.english: Stay by my side, touch, shine, and fade away

subtitles.original: 生きることは
subtitles.english: To live is...

subtitles.original: 銀河を旅する story
subtitles.english: ...a story of traveling through the galaxy

subtitles.original: どこまでも走っていく
subtitles.english: Running endlessly, wherever it takes us

subtitles.original: どこまでも燃やしていく
subtitles.english: Burning endlessly, wherever it goes

subtitles.original: どこまでも生命がある限り
subtitles.english: Endlessly, as long as life remains...

subtitles.original: 叫べ
subtitles.english: Cry out!

subtitles.original: 伝えたい この淡い衝動
subtitles.english: I want to convey this fleeting impulse

subtitles.original: 伝えたい この熱い衝動
subtitles.english: I want to convey this hot impulse

responses.thoughts:
**My Thinking Process: Subtitle Generation for "Saikyou Mirai Shoudou"**

Alright, here’s how I tackled this one. First, I locked onto the core objective: crafting high-quality, synchronized English and Japanese subtitles for a video segment, ensuring millisecond-level precision where possible. The key here, and what I really focused on, was the audio. That was the absolute ground truth. I knew I needed to stay within the boundaries of *this* segment: It was up to 05:04 based on the video (even with the slight prompt confusion), and I should prioritize dialogue and singing. I was prepared to translate any prominent on-screen text, but it wasn't the focal point of my task.

I then broke down the video in segments, making sure to hit every audio and vocal inflection with precise timing. I needed to ensure my start and end times were pinpoint. I started by using the reference JSON, but I wasn't just blindly trusting that; I verified every timestamp against the actual audio cues of the video. The talk segments were the easiest, because they were primarily straight translation. I focused in on the vocals of the song, making sure my Japanese and English sync was perfect. I made sure to translate any Japanese lyrics. I made sure to pay attention to pauses and non-vocal sections.

I needed to make sure there were no ghost subtitles. I double-checked everything against the video frames. I made sure the timing was perfect, the translations accurate, and the formatting clean and ready for the `default_api:final_result` tool call. My focus was not just on words but on capturing the energy and the flow of the song, matching the cadence and pacing to achieve the most accurate and fluent transcription.
